history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so I must not move forward. The safe route is to go downward into row 03 column B, so I need to turn right to face down first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front of me at row 03 column B is safe (`.`), while the lava at row 02 column C blocks moving right from here. Moving forward takes me into the open path toward the goal at row 08 column H, so the safest and most direct next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 04 column B is safe (`.`), so the best next move is to advance toward the lower open area and eventually toward the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B and facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead at row 05 column B is safe (`.`), while the lava at column C and the walls around the border make the simplest safe move to continue downward. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B, facing down. Moving forward would go to row 06 column B, which is safe. This brings me closer to the lower-right area where the goal is, so I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B, facing down. The cell in front of me (row 07 column B) is lava, so I cannot move forward. I need to turn to find a safe path. The left side is a wall, so the safest useful move is to turn right and face column C, where there is an open floor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing left (`<`). The cell directly ahead at column A is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To head toward the goal at row 08 column H, I need to turn to face right and then navigate through the safe open cells.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B, facing up. The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving up would hit a safe floor, but the direct path upward is not useful toward the goal. I need to get into the open corridor to the right, so the best next step is to turn right and face east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B, facing right. The safe path to the goal at row 08 column H is to move right along row 06, since the cells ahead are floor and there is no need to enter lava. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column C, facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 08 column H. Moving forward from here to the right is safe, while the cells above and below in the nearby columns include lava barriers. The best next step is to continue moving right toward the open path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column D facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. The path to the right from my position is safe, and moving forward brings me closer to the goal without stepping on lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column E, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. The path to the goal is blocked by lava if I go straight down through column E, so I should move right toward the open safe area and then head down toward the goal. The next cell to the right is safe.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column F, facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 08 column H. Moving forward from here would go to row 06 column G, which is safe, and it brings me closer to the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column G facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 08 column H, which is down-right from my current position, but moving right from G would take me into H on row 06, which is safe. From there I can continue toward the goal while avoiding lava. The next safe step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H, facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H, which is directly below me, but moving forward would hit the wall at I. I need to turn to face down first, and then I can move toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H, facing down. The goal is at row 08 column H, directly below me, and the cells in between are safe floor cells. Moving forward will take me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column H facing down (`v`). The cell directly in front of me is row 08 column H, which is the goal `O`. I can move forward safely to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
